zh.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard del Sandes於大約1264年出生在英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯時，他的父親Henry del Sandes28歲，母親unknown26歲。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard del Sandes于大约1264年出生在英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯时，他的父亲Henry del Sandes28岁，母亲unknown26岁。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Sandes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of various places so named in Galicia (Spain). Compare   Sandez  .

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard del Sandes was born about 1264, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, his father, Henry del Sandes, was 28 and his mother, unknown, was 26. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard del Sandes est né environ 1264, à Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry del Sandes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, unknown, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard del Sandes um 1264 in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry del Sandes 28 und seine Mutter unknown 26. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard del Sandes è nato il circa 1264 nel Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Henry del Sandes, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, unknown, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard del Sandesが約1264年にイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズで生まれた時，父Henry del Sandesは28歳，母unknownは26歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard del Sandes(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry del Sandes(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 unknown(은)는 26세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard del Sandes nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry del Sandes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, unknown, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard del Sandes родился около 1264 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry del Sandes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали unknown, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard del Sandes nació aproximadamente 1264, en Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry del Sandes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, unknown, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
